title: Dua in times of distress
arabic_text: اللهُ اللهُ ربِّي لَا أُشرِكُ به شيئًا
english_text: Allah, Allah, my Lord, I do not associate anything with Him

title: Dua of Prophet Yunus a.s.
arabic_text: لاَّ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنتَ سُبْحَانَكَ إِنِّى كُنتُ مِنَ الظَّالِمِينَ
english_text: There is no god but You, exalted are You! Indeed, I have been of the wrongdoers.

title: Dua for seeking refuge from severe calamity, misery, and to be freed from misfortune
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ جَهْدِ الْبَلَاءِ، وَدَرَكِ الشَّقَاءِ، وَسُوءِ الْقَضَاءِ، وَشَمَاتَةِ الْأَعْدَاءِ
english_text: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from severe calamity, from misery to fall upon me, from misfortune in the decree, and from the joys of the enemies.

title: Dua to attain calmness of the heart from being anxious
arabic_text: رَبِّ اشْرَحْ لِي صَدْرِي وَيَسِّرْ لِي أَمْرِي وَاحْلُلْ عُقْدَةً مِّن لِّسَانِي يَفْقَهُوا قَوْلِي
english_text: Lord, lift up my heart and ease my task for me. Remove the impediment from my tongue so that they may understand my speech.

title: Dua for attaining confidence in Allah s.w.t.
arabic_text: رَبَّنَا عَلَيْكَ تَوَكَّلْنَا وَإِلَيْكَ أَنَبْنَا وَإِلَيْكَ الْمَصِيرُ
english_text: Our Lord! In You we have placed our trust, and to You we turn in repentance, and to You is the final return.

title: Dua for hardship and distress
arabic_text: حَسْبِيَ اللَّهُ لآ إلَهَ إلَّا هُوَ، عَلَيْهَ توَكَّلتُ، وَهُوَ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ
english_text: Allah is sufficient for me. There is none worthy of worship but Him. I have placed my trust in Him, and He is the lord of the Majestic Throne.

title: Du’a for Anxiety
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ الْهَمِّ وَالْحُزْنِ وَالْعَجْزِ وَالْكَسَلِ وَالْبُخْلِ وَالْجُبْنِ وَضَلَعِ الدَّيْنِ وَغَلَبَةِ الرِّجَالِ
english_text: O Allah, I take refuge in you from anxiety and sorrow, weakness and laziness, miserliness and cowardice, the burden of debts and from being overpowered by men.

title: Du’a for Stress
arabic_text: حَسْبُنَا ٱللَّهُ وَنِعْمَ ٱلْوَكِيلُ
english_text: Allah is sufficient for us, and He is the best disposer of affairs.

title: Du’a for Worry
arabic_text: لَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِالله
english_text: There is no power or strength except with Allah.

title: Du’a for Parents Health
arabic_text: رَبِّ أَوْزِعْنِي أَنْ أَشْكُرَ نِعْمَتَكَ الَّتِي أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيَّ وَعَلَىٰ وَالِدَيَّ وَأَنْ أَعْمَلَ صَالِحًا تَرْضَاهُ وَأَدْخِلْنِي بِرَحْمَتِكَ فِي عِبَادِكَ الصَّالِحِينَ
english_text: My Lord, inspire me to (always) be thankful for the blessings You have granted me and my parents, and to do good deeds that please You; admit me by Your grace into the ranks of Your righteous servants

title: Du’a for forgiveness for parents
arabic_text: رَبَّنَا اغْفِرْ لِي وَلِوَالِدَيَّ وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ يَوْمَ يَقُومُ الْحِسَابُ
english_text: Our Lord! Forgive me, my parents, and the believers on the Day when the judgment will come to pass.

title: Du’a for mercy for parents
arabic_text: رَّبِّ ارْحَمْهُمَا كَمَا رَبَّيَانِي صَغِيرًا
english_text: My Lord! Be merciful to them as they raised me when I was young.

title: Du’a for forgiveness and protection from hellfire
arabic_text: ٱلَّذِينَ يَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَآ إِنَّنَآ ءَامَنَّافَٱغْفِرْ لَنَا ذُنُوبَنَا وَقِنَا عَذَابَ ٱلنَّارِ
english_text: Our Lord! surely we believe, therefore forgive us our faults and save us from the chastisement of the fire.

title: Du’a for forgiveness, removal of misdeeds and to join the righteous when we die
arabic_text: رَبَّنَا فَاغْفِرْ لَنَا ذُنُوبَنَا وَكَفِّرْ عَنَّا سَيِّئَاتِنَا وَتَوَفَّنَا مَعَ الأَبْرَارِ
english_text: Our Lord! Forgive our sins, remove from us our misdeeds, and grant that we join the righteous when we die.

title: Dua for Good in This World and the Next
arabic_text: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً
english_text: O Allah, grant us goodness in this world and goodness in the Hereafter.

title: Dua for Relief From Worry and Sorrow
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الهَمِّ وَالحَزَنِ
english_text: O Allah, I seek refuge with You from worry and sadness.

title: Dua for Inner Peace
arabic_text: أَلَا بِذِكْرِ اللَّهِ تَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ
english_text: Surely, in the remembrance of Allah do hearts find rest.

title: Dua for Removing Distress
arabic_text: يَا حَيُّ يَا قَيُّومُ بِرَحْمَتِكَ أَسْتَغِيثُ
english_text: O Ever-Living, O Sustainer, I seek help through Your mercy.

title: Dua for Protection From Depression & Weakness
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الجُبْنِ وَالبُخْلِ
english_text: O Allah, protect me from cowardice and miserliness.

title: Dua for Light in the Heart
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ فِي قَلْبِي نُورًا
english_text: O Allah, place light in my heart.

title: Dua for Strength, Peace & Reliance
arabic_text: حَسْبُنَا اللَّهُ وَنِعْمَ الْوَكِيلُ
english_text: Allah is sufficient for us, and He is the best disposer of affairs.

title: Dua for Ease in All Matters
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ لَا سَهْلَ إِلَّا مَا جَعَلْتَهُ سَهْلًا
english_text: O Allah, nothing is easy except what You make easy.

title: Dua for Protection From Laziness & Failure
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ العَجْزِ وَالْكَسَلِ
english_text: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from weakness and laziness

title: Dua for strength
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الثَّبَاتَ فِي الْأَمْرِ وَالْعَزْمَةَ عَلَى الرُّشْدِ
english_text: O Allah, I ask You for steadfastness in the matter (of religion) and I ask You for determination upon guidance.

title: Dua for Allah to Handle Your Problems
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ اكْفِنِيهِمْ بِمَا شِئْتَ
english_text: O Allah, suffice me against them however You will.

title: Dua for Abundant Rizq
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ أَكْثِرْ مَالَهُ
english_text: O Allah, increase his wealth.

title: Dua for Removing Poverty & Debt
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ اكْفِنِي بِحَلَالِكَ عَنْ حَرَامِكَ
english_text: O Allah, suffice me with what is halal and keep me away from haram.

title: Dua for Sustenance & Open Doors
arabic_text: وَمَنْ يَتَّقِ اللَّهَ يَجْعَلْ لَهُ مَخْرَجًا • وَيَرْزُقْهُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَحْتَسِبُ
english_text: Whoever fears Allah — He will provide for him from where he never expected.

title: Dua for Guidance & Righteousness
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ اهْدِنِي لِأَحْسَنِ الْأَعْمَالِ
english_text: O Allah, guide me to the best of actions.

title: Dua for Protection From Misguidance
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ أَنْ أَضِلَّ أَوْ أُضَلَّ
english_text: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from going astray or leading others astray.

title: Dua for Guidance to the Straight Path
arabic_text: اهْدِنَا الصِّرَاطَ الْمُسْتَقِيمَ
english_text: Guide us to the Straight Path.

title: Dua for a Clean, Guided Heart
arabic_text: رَبَّنَا لَا تُزِغْ قُلُوبَنَا
english_text: O our Lord, do not let our hearts deviate.

title: Dua for Understanding the Truth
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ أَرِنَا الْحَقَّ حَقًّا
english_text: اللَّهُمَّ أَرِنَا الْحَقَّ حَقًّا

title: Dua for Strength to Follow Guidance
arabic_text: رَبِّ اجْعَلْنِي مُقِيمَ الصَّلَاةِ
english_text: My Lord, make me one who establishes prayer.

title: Dua for All Types of Protection (Morning & Evening)
arabic_text: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيْءٌ
english_text: In the Name of Allah, with whose name nothing can harm.

title: Dua for Protection From All Harm
arabic_text: أَعُوذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ
english_text: I seek refuge in Allah’s perfect words from the evil of what He created.

title: Dua for Protection From Trials & Hardship
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ جَهْدِ الْبَلَاءِ
english_text: O Allah, I seek Your protection from severe trials.”

title: Dua for Protection From Evil People
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ اكْفِنِيهِمْ بِمَا شِئْتَ
english_text: O Allah, protect me from them in any way You will.

title: Dua for Removing Sadness & Distress
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الهَمِّ وَالحَزَنِ
english_text: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from worry and sadness.

title: Dua for Patience During Hard Times
arabic_text: رَبِّ فَاصْبِرْ صَبْرًا جَمِيلًا
english_text: My Lord, grant me beautiful patience.

title: Dua for Mental Peace & Calmness
arabic_text: سَلَامٌ قَوْلًا مِنْ رَبٍّ رَحِيمٍ
english_text: Peace — a word from the Lord, Most Merciful.

title: Dua for Removing Grief & Burden
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ رَحْمَتَكَ أَرْجُو
english_text: O Allah, Your mercy is what I hope for.

title: Dua for Strength to Handle Problems
arabic_text: وَعَلَى اللَّهِ فَتَوَكَّلُوا
english_text: And put your trust in Allah.

title: Dua When Feeling Hopeless or Weak
arabic_text: لَا تَحْزَنْ إِنَّ اللَّهَ مَعَنَا
english_text: Do not grieve; indeed Allah is with us

title: Dua for Replacing Sadness With Joy
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ أَذْهِبْ الْبَأْسَ
english_text: O Allah, remove suffering.

title: Dua for Ease in All Matters
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ لَا سَهْلَ إِلَّا مَا جَعَلْتَهُ سَهْلًا
english_text: O Allah, nothing is easy except what You make easy.

title: Dua for Relief From Hardships
arabic_text: رَبِّ إِنِّي مَسَّنِيَ الضُّرُّ وَأَنتَ أَرْحَمُ الرَّاحِمِينَ
english_text: My Lord, harm has touched me, and You are the Most Merciful.

title: Dua for Easing Tight Situations
arabic_text: وَمَن يَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى اللَّهِ فَهُوَ حَسْبُهُ
english_text: Whoever relies upon Allah — He is sufficient for him.

title: Dua for Removal of Hard Tasks
arabic_text: رَبِّ يَسِّرْ وَلَا تُعَسِّرْ
english_text: My Lord, make it easy and do not make it difficult.

title: Dua for Calmness During Fearful Moments
arabic_text: لَا تَخَافَا إِنَّنِي مَعَكُمَا
english_text: Fear not — indeed I am with you both.

title: Dua When Matters Become Difficult
arabic_text: سَيَجْعَلُ اللَّهُ بَعْدَ عُسْرٍ يُسْرًا
english_text: Allah will bring about ease after hardship.

title: Dua When You Feel Overwhelmed
arabic_text: لَا يُكَلِّفُ اللَّهُ نَفْسًا إِلَّا وُسْعَهَا
english_text: Allah does not burden a soul beyond what it can bear.

title: Dua for a Righteous, Loving Family
arabic_text: رَبَّنَا هَبْ لَنَا مِنْ أَزْوَاجِنَا وَذُرِّيَّاتِنَا قُرَّةَ أَعْيُنٍ
english_text: O our Lord, grant us from our spouses and children the comfort of our eyes.

title: Dua for a Loving & Peaceful Marriage
arabic_text: وَجَعَلَ بَيْنَكُم مَّوَدَّةً وَرَحْمَةً
english_text: And He placed between you affection and mercy.

title: Dua for Strengthening Family Relationships
arabic_text: وَاعْفُ عَنَّا وَاغْفِرْ لَنَا وَارْحَمْنَا
english_text: “Pardon us, forgive us, and have mercy on us.

title: Dua for Unity Between Family Members
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ أَلِّفْ بَيْنَ قُلُوبِنَا
english_text: O Allah, unite our hearts.

title: Dua for Protection Against Family Problems
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ اكْفِنِي شَرَّهُمْ
english_text: O Allah, protect me from their evil.

title: Dua for a Happy, Peaceful Home
arabic_text: رَبِّ أَنْزِلْنِي مُنْزَلًا مُبَارَكًا
english_text: My Lord, grant me a blessed place to live.

title: Dua for Forgiveness of All Sins
arabic_text: رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي وَارْحَمْنِي
english_text: My Lord, forgive me and have mercy on me.

title: Dua for Entering Paradise
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْجَنَّةَ
english_text: O Allah, I ask You for Paradise.

title: Dua for Protection From Hellfire
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ أَجِرْنِي مِنَ النَّارِ
english_text: O Allah, protect me from the Fire.

title: Dua for Allah’s Pleasure
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ رِضَاكَ
english_text: O Allah, I ask You for Your pleasure.

title: Dua for a Good Ending (Husnul Khatimah)
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ اخْتِمْ لَنَا بِالْخَيْرِ
english_text: O Allah, grant us a good ending.

title: Dua of Yunus (AS): Powerful for Forgiveness
arabic_text: لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ سُبْحَانَكَ إِنِّي كُنْتُ مِنَ الظَّالِمِينَ
english_text: There is no god except You; You are far above any imperfection. I was among the wrongdoers.

title: Dua for Vast Forgiveness & Mercy
arabic_text: رَبِّ اغْفِرْ وَارْحَمْ وَأَنْتَ خَيْرُ الرَّاحِمِينَ
english_text: My Lord, forgive and have mercy — You are the best of the merciful

title: Comprehensive Dua for Goodness
arabic_text: رَبِّ أَوْزِعْنِي أَنْ أَشْكُرَ نِعْمَتَكَ
english_text: My Lord, enable me to be grateful for Your blessings.

title: Dua for Allah’s Protection, Mercy & Blessing
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ رَبِّي لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
english_text: O Allah, You are my Lord, none has the right to be worshiped except You…

title: Dua for Blessings in Everything
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْعَافِيَةَ
english_text: O Allah, I ask You for well-being.

title: Dua for Every Good This World Holds
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَ مَا فِي هَذَا الْيَوْمِ
english_text: O Allah, I ask You for the good of this day.

title: Dua for protection from illnesses
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْبَرَصِ وَالْجُنُونِ وَالْجُذَامِ وَمِنْ وَسَيِّيءِ الأَسْقَامِ
english_text: Oh Allah! I seek refuge in you from vitiligo, madness, leprosy, and evil diseases

title: Du'a when being afraid of a group of people
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ اكْفِنِيهِم بمَا شِئْت
english_text: O Allah, suffice (i. e. protect) me against them however You wish.

title: Du'a against enemies
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ مُنْزِلَ الْكِتَاب سَرِيعَ الْحِسَاب اهْزِم الأَحْزَاب اللَّهُمَّ اهْزِمْهُمْ وَ زَلْزِلْهُم
english_text: O Allah, Revealer of the Book, Swift to account, defeat the groups (of disbelievers). O Allah, defeat them and shake them.

title: Du'a for one afflicted with doubt in his faith
arabic_text: أَعـوذُ بِاللهِ يَسْتَعِيذُ بِاللَّهِ يَنْتَهِي عَمَّا شك فِيهِ
english_text: I seek refuge in Allah.(Then you should desist from doing what you are in doubt about.)

title: Du'a settling a debt
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَالْحَزَنِ وَالْعَجْزِ وَالْكَسَلِ وَالْبُخْلِ وَالْجُبْنِ وَضَلَعِ الدَّيْنِ وَغَلَبَةِ الرِّجَالِ
english_text: O Allah! I seek refuge with You from worry and grief, from incapacity and laziness, from cowardice and miserliness, from being heavily in debt and from being overpowered by (other) men.

title: For one whose affairs have become difficult
arabic_text: اللَّهُمَّ لاَ سَهْلَ إِلاَّ مَا جَعَلْتَهُ سَهْلاً وَأَنْتَ تَجْعَلُ الْحَزْنَ إِذَا شِئْتَ سَهْلاً
english_text: O Allah, there is no ease other than what You make easy. If You please You ease sorrow.

title: Upon encountering an enemy or those of authority
arabic_text: اللّهُـمَّ أَنْتَ عَضُـدي وَأَنْتَ نَصـيري بِكَ أَجـولُ وَبِكَ أَصـولُ وَبِكَ أُقـاتِل
english_text: O Allah, You are my strength and You are my support. For Your sake, I go forth and for Your sake, I advance and for Your sake, I fight.
